basic_details.short_information: Candidates who are interested in applying for the EMRS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.details: PGT (History, Economics, Geography & Commerce): Prescribed qualifications and Teaching experience.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Career assessment Teaching experience Viva voce

all_official_links.label: Download EMRS PGT (History, Economics, Geography & Commerce) Job 2026 Notificati

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the EMRS PGT recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 22 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they are prepared to attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for PGT posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess the prescribed qualifications and have teaching experience for the PGT positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the EMRS PGT recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates is between 18 years and 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a Walk-in recruitment. Candidates need to register via a Google Form and submit a hard copy of the application at the time of reporting for the interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the PGT posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a career assessment, evaluation of teaching experience, and a viva voce.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the Eklavya Model Residential School located?
faq.answer: The Eklavya Model Residential School is located in Nabarangpur, Odisha, with the pincode 764059.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the provided details for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these PGT positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these PGT positions is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification link is usually available on the organization's official website or through the provided links in the recruitment article.
